# Test Fixtures

This directory contains test fixtures for SAFS tests:

- `loki_crashes/` - LOKi crash logs (5 samples)
- `dmesg/` - MediaTek kernel oops logs (3 samples)
- `cdp_traces/` - Chrome DevTools Protocol traces
- `source_maps/` - JavaScript source maps

Fixtures will be added in later phases as components are implemented.
